verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: ॐ जय शिव ओंकारा, स्वामी जय शिव ओंकारा।
ब्रह्मा, विष्णु, सदाशिव, अर्द्धांगी धारा॥
transliteration: Om Jai Shiv Omkara, Swami Jai Shiv Omkara.
Brahma, Vishnu, Sadashiv, Ardhangee Dhara.
meanings: Praise be to Lord Shiva, the embodiment of the sacred syllable Om.
Brahma, Vishnu and Sada Shiva — the one who holds his half-body as the divine feminine.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: एकानन चतुरानन पञ्चानन राजे।
हंसानन गरुड़ासन वृषवाहन साजे॥
transliteration: Ekaanan Chaturaanan Panchaanan Raaje.
Hansaanan Garudaasan Vrishavaahan Saaje.
meanings: The one-faced, four-faced, and five-faced lord reigns supreme.
Riding upon the swan, the eagle and the bull — each form adorned magnificently.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: दो भुज चार चतुर्भुज दस भुज अति सोहे।
तीनों रूप निरखते त्रिभुवन जन मोहे॥
transliteration: Do Bhuj Char Chaturbhuj Das Bhuj Ati Sohe.
Teeno Roop Nirakhte Tribhuvan Jan Mohe.
meanings: Two-armed, four-armed, ten-armed — each form resplendent in its glory.
Beholding these three forms, all beings of the three worlds are enchanted.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: अक्षमाला वनमाला मुंडमाला धारी।
चंदन मृगमद सोहे भाले शशिधारी॥
transliteration: Akshamala Vanamala Mundamala Dhari.
Chandan Mrigmad Sohe Bhale Shashidhari.
meanings: Adorned with a rosary of beads, a garland of forest flowers, and a garland of skulls.
Sandalwood and musk adorn his forehead, the one who wears the crescent moon.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: श्वेताम्बर पीताम्बर बाघम्बर अंगे।
सनकादिक गरुणादिक भूतादिक संगे॥
transliteration: Shvetambar Pitambar Baaghambar Ange.
Sanakadik Garunadik Bhutadik Sange.
meanings: Wearing white robes, yellow robes, and tiger skin on his body.
Accompanied by Sanaka and other sages, Garuda and others, and spirits.

verses.label: Verse 5
lines: कर के मध्य कमंडलु चक्र त्रिशूलधारी।
सुखकारी दुखहारी जगपालन कारी॥
transliteration: Kar Ke Madhya Kamandalu Chakra Trishuldhari.
Sukhkari Dukhahari Jagpalan Kari.
meanings: In his hands he holds a water pot, a discus, and a trident.
He brings happiness, removes sorrow, and sustains the world.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: जय गणेश जय गणेश जय गणेश देवा।
माता जाकी पार्वती पिता महादेवा॥
transliteration: Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh Deva.
Mata Jaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva.
meanings: Glory to Lord Ganesha, the divine one.
Whose mother is Parvati and father is the great Lord Shiva.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: एक दंत दयावंत चार भुजा धारी।
माथे पर तिलक सोहे मूसे की सवारी॥
transliteration: Ek Dant Dayavant Char Bhuja Dhari.
Mathe Par Tilak Sohe Muse Ki Savari.
meanings: The single-tusked compassionate one, bearing four arms.
A tilak adorns his forehead, and a mouse is his mount.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: पान चढ़े फूल चढ़े और चढ़े मेवा।
लड्डुअन का भोग लगे संत करें सेवा॥
transliteration: Paan Chadhe Phool Chadhe Aur Chadhe Meva.
Ladduan Ka Bhog Lage Sant Karein Seva.
meanings: Betel leaves, flowers and dry fruits are offered to him.
Laddoos are offered as food, and saints serve him devotionally.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: अंधन को आंख देत कोढ़िन को काया।
बांझन को पुत्र देत निर्धन को माया॥
transliteration: Andhan Ko Aankh Det Kodhin Ko Kaya.
Banjhan Ko Putra Det Nirdhan Ko Maya.
meanings: He gives sight to the blind and health to the lepers.
He blesses the childless with sons and the poor with wealth.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: सूर श्याम शरण आये सफल कीजे सेवा।
माता जाकी पार्वती पिता महादेवा॥
transliteration: Soor Shyam Sharan Aaye Safal Kije Seva.
Mata Jaki Parvati Pita Mahadeva.
meanings: Surdas and Shyam have come to your refuge, make their devotion fruitful.
Whose mother is Parvati and father is the great Lord Shiva.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: ॐ जय लक्ष्मी माता, मैया जय लक्ष्मी माता।
तुमको निशदिन सेवत, हरि विष्णु विधाता॥
transliteration: Om Jai Lakshmi Mata, Maiya Jai Lakshmi Mata.
Tumko Nishdin Sevat, Hari Vishnu Vidhata.
meanings: Glory to Mother Lakshmi, O divine mother.
Day and night, Lord Vishnu the creator serves you.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: उमा रमा ब्रह्माणी, तुम ही जग माता।
सूर्य चन्द्रमा ध्यावत, नारद ऋषि गाता॥
transliteration: Uma Rama Brahmani, Tum Hi Jag Mata.
Surya Chandrama Dhyavat, Narad Rishi Gata.
meanings: As Uma, Rama, and Brahmani — you alone are the mother of the world.
The sun and moon meditate upon you, sage Narada sings your glory.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: दुर्गा रूप निरंजनी, सुख सम्पत्ति दाता।
जो कोई तुमको ध्यावत, ऋद्धि सिद्धि धन पाता॥
transliteration: Durga Roop Niranjani, Sukh Sampatti Data.
Jo Koi Tumko Dhyavat, Riddhi Siddhi Dhan Pata.
meanings: In the form of Durga, the pure one, you bestow happiness and wealth.
Whoever meditates upon you gains prosperity, powers and riches.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: तुम पाताल निवासिनी, तुम ही शुभदाता।
कर्म प्रभाव प्रकाशिनी, भवनिधि की त्राता॥
transliteration: Tum Patal Nivasini, Tum Hi Shubhdata.
Karma Prabhav Prakashini, Bhavnidhi Ki Trata.
meanings: You dwell in the netherworld, you alone are the bestower of good fortune.
You illuminate the power of karma and are the saviour from the ocean of existence.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: जिस घर में तुम रहती, सब सद्गुण आता।
सब सम्भव हो जाता, मन नहीं घबराता॥
transliteration: Jis Ghar Mein Tum Rahti, Sab Sadgun Aata.
Sab Sambhav Ho Jata, Man Nahin Ghabrata.
meanings: In the home where you reside, all virtues arrive.
Everything becomes possible, the mind fears not.

verses.label: Verse 5
lines: तुम बिन यज्ञ न होवे, वस्त्र न कोई पाता।
खान पान का वैभव, सब तुमसे आता॥
transliteration: Tum Bin Yagya Na Hove, Vastra Na Koi Pata.
Khan Pan Ka Vaibhav, Sab Tumse Aata.
meanings: Without you, no sacred fire can be lit, no one receives clothing.
The splendour of food and drink — all comes from you.

verses.label: Verse 6
lines: शुभ गुण मन्दिर सुन्दर, क्षीरोदधि जाता।
रत्न चतुर्दश तुम बिन, कोई नहीं पाता॥
transliteration: Shubh Gun Mandir Sundar, Kshirodadhi Jata.
Ratna Chaturdash Tum Bin, Koi Nahin Pata.
meanings: Beautiful temple of auspicious virtues, born from the ocean of milk.
Without you, no one can obtain the fourteen jewels.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: आरती कीजै हनुमान लला की।
दुष्ट दलन रघुनाथ कला की॥
transliteration: Aarti Kijai Hanuman Lala Ki.
Dusht Dalan Raghunath Kala Ki.
meanings: Let us perform the aarti of dear Hanuman.
The destroyer of evil, an embodiment of Lord Rama's power.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: जाके बल से गिरिवर कांपे।
रोग दोष जाके निकट न झांके॥
transliteration: Jake Bal Se Girivar Kampe.
Rog Dosh Jake Nikat Na Jhanke.
meanings: By whose strength even great mountains tremble.
Diseases and faults dare not look near him.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: अंजनि पुत्र महा बलदाई।
संतन के प्रभु सदा सहाई॥
transliteration: Anjani Putra Maha Baldai.
Santan Ke Prabhu Sada Sahai.
meanings: Son of Anjani, of immense strength.
Always the helper and lord of the devotees.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: दे बीरा रघुनाथ पठाये।
लंका जारि सिया सुधि लाये॥
transliteration: De Bira Raghunath Pathaaye.
Lanka Jari Siya Sudhi Laye.
meanings: The brave one, sent by Lord Rama.
Burned Lanka and brought news of Sita.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: लंका सो कोट समुद्र सी खाई।
जात पवनसुत बार न लाई॥
transliteration: Lanka So Kot Samudra Si Khai.
Jat Pawansut Bar Na Lai.
meanings: Lanka's fort was surrounded by an ocean-like moat.
Yet the son of the Wind crossed it without delay.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: आरती कुंजबिहारी की।
श्री गिरिधर कृष्णमुरारी की॥
transliteration: Aarti Kunj Bihari Ki.
Shri Giridhar Krishna Murari Ki.
meanings: Let us sing the aarti of Kunj Bihari (Krishna who plays in the groves).
Of Shri Giridhar, Krishna, the enemy of demon Mura.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: गले में बैजंती माला, बजावै मुरली मधुर बाला।
श्रवण में कुण्डल झलकाला, नन्द के आनंद नन्दलाला॥
transliteration: Gale Mein Baijanti Mala, Bajave Murli Madhur Bala.
Shravan Mein Kundal Jhalakala, Nand Ke Anand Nandlala.
meanings: With a Vaijayanti garland around his neck, the divine child plays his sweet flute.
Earrings glitter in his ears — the blissful child of Nanda.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: गगन सम अंग कान्ति काली, राधिका चमक रही आली।
लतन में ठाढ़े बनमाली, भ्रमर सी अलक कस्तूरी तिलक लाली॥
transliteration: Gagan Sam Ang Kanti Kali, Radhika Chamak Rahi Aali.
Latan Mein Thaadhe Banmali, Bhramar Si Alak Kasturi Tilak Lali.
meanings: His dark-hued body shines like the sky, Radhika gleams beside him.
Banmali stands among the creepers, with bee-like curly locks and a musk tilak.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: कनकमय मोर मुकुट बिलसै, देवता दरसन को तरसै।
गगन सों सुमन रासि बरसै, हाथन में वेणु बिराजै॥
transliteration: Kanakmay Mor Mukut Bilase, Devta Darshan Ko Tarse.
Gagan Son Suman Raasi Barse, Hathan Mein Venu Biraje.
meanings: A golden peacock-feathered crown shines on his head, even gods long for his sight.
From the sky, showers of flowers rain down; a flute graces his hands.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: छांड़ थई गोपिन यह लीला, चमके चन्द ही जैसी लीला।
काटि कुब्जा हृदय की पीला, आरती कुंजबिहारी की॥
transliteration: Chhand Thai Gopin Yeh Leela, Chamke Chand Hi Jaisi Leela.
Kati Kubja Hriday Ki Peela, Aarti Kunj Bihari Ki.
meanings: Leaving behind the gopis in this divine play, shining like the radiant moon.
He removed the sorrow from Kubja's heart — sing the aarti of Kunj Bihari.

verses.label: Verse 5
lines: जहां ते प्रकट भई गंगा, सकल मनुवांछित फल पंगा।
करें भजन जे अनुरागा, आरती कुंजबिहारी की॥
transliteration: Jahan Te Prakat Bhai Ganga, Sakal Manuvanchhit Phal Panga.
Karein Bhajan Je Anuraga, Aarti Kunj Bihari Ki.
meanings: From where the holy Ganga manifested, granting all desired fruits.
Those who sing devotional hymns with love — let us sing the aarti of Kunj Bihari.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: ॐ जय जगदीश हरे, स्वामी जय जगदीश हरे।
भक्त जनों के संकट, दास जनों के संकट, क्षण में दूर करे॥
transliteration: Om Jai Jagdish Hare, Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
Bhakt Janon Ke Sankat, Das Janon Ke Sankat, Kshan Mein Door Kare.
meanings: Glory to the Lord of the universe, O Lord Hari.
The troubles of devotees and servants — you remove in an instant.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: जो ध्यावे फल पावे, दुख बिनसे मन का।
स्वामी दुख बिनसे मन का, सुख सम्पत्ति घर आवे, कष्ट मिटे तन का॥
transliteration: Jo Dhyave Phal Pave, Dukh Binse Man Ka.
Swami Dukh Binse Man Ka, Sukh Sampatti Ghar Aave, Kasht Mite Tan Ka.
meanings: He who meditates obtains the fruit, sorrows of the mind vanish.
O Lord, sorrows vanish, happiness and wealth enter the home, bodily suffering ends.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: मात पिता तुम मेरे, शरण गहूं मैं किसकी।
स्वामी शरण गहूं मैं किसकी, तुम बिन और न दूजा, आस करूं मैं जिसकी॥
transliteration: Mat Pita Tum Mere, Sharan Gahun Main Kiski.
Swami Sharan Gahun Main Kiski, Tum Bin Aur Na Dooja, Aas Karun Main Jiski.
meanings: You are my mother and father, whose refuge shall I seek?
O Lord, whose refuge shall I seek? There is no other but you in whom I place my hope.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: तुम पूरण परमात्मा, तुम अन्तर्यामी।
स्वामी तुम अन्तर्यामी, पारब्रह्म परमेश्वर, तुम सबके स्वामी॥
transliteration: Tum Puran Parmatma, Tum Antaryami.
Swami Tum Antaryami, Parbrahm Parmeshwar, Tum Sabke Swami.
meanings: You are the complete Supreme Soul, you are the inner knower.
O Lord, the inner knower, the Supreme Brahman, the highest God — you are everyone's master.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: तुम करुणा के सागर, तुम पालनकर्ता।
स्वामी तुम पालनकर्ता, मैं मूरख खल कामी, कृपा करो भर्ता॥
transliteration: Tum Karuna Ke Sagar, Tum Palankarta.
Swami Tum Palankarta, Main Murakh Khal Kami, Kripa Karo Bharta.
meanings: You are the ocean of compassion, you are the sustainer.
O Lord, I am a foolish, wicked, lustful being — shower your grace, O protector.

verses.label: Verse 5
lines: तुम हो एक अगोचर, सबके प्राणपति।
स्वामी सबके प्राणपति, किस विधि मिलूं दयामय, तुमको मैं कुमति॥
transliteration: Tum Ho Ek Agochar, Sabke Pranpati.
Swami Sabke Pranpati, Kis Vidhi Milun Dayamay, Tumko Main Kumati.
meanings: You are the one unseen, the lord of all life.
O Lord of all life, how shall I, with my weak mind, meet you, O compassionate one?

verses.label: Verse 6
lines: दीनबन्धु दुख हर्ता, ठाकुर तुम मेरे।
स्वामी रक्षक तुम मेरे, अपने हाथ उठाओ, अपनी शरण लगाओ॥
transliteration: Deenbandhu Dukh Harta, Thakur Tum Mere.
Swami Rakshak Tum Mere, Apne Hath Uthao, Apni Sharan Lagao.
meanings: Friend of the humble, remover of sorrows — you are my Lord.
O Lord, you are my protector, raise your hands and grant me your shelter.

verses.label: Verse 7
lines: विषय विकार मिटाओ, पाप हरो देवा।
स्वामी पाप हरो देवा, श्रद्धा भक्ति बढ़ाओ, सन्तन की सेवा॥
transliteration: Vishay Vikar Mitao, Paap Haro Deva.
Swami Paap Haro Deva, Shraddha Bhakti Badhao, Santan Ki Seva.
meanings: Remove the worldly afflictions, take away sins O Lord.
O Lord, remove our sins, increase our faith and devotion in service to the saints.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: जय अम्बे गौरी, मैया जय श्यामा गौरी।
तुमको निशदिन ध्यावत, हरि ब्रह्मा शिवरी॥
transliteration: Jai Ambe Gauri, Maiya Jai Shyama Gauri.
Tumko Nishdin Dhyavat, Hari Brahma Shivri.
meanings: Glory to Mother Ambe Gauri, of fair and dark complexion.
Day and night, Hari, Brahma and Shiva meditate upon you.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: मांग सिन्दूर विराजत, टीको मृगमद को।
उज्ज्वल से दोउ नैना, चन्द्रवदन नीको॥
transliteration: Maang Sindoor Virajat, Tiko Mrigmad Ko.
Ujjwal Se Dou Naina, Chandravadan Niko.
meanings: Vermillion adorns your parting, with a musk tilak on your forehead.
Your two eyes shine brightly, your moon-like face is beautiful.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: कनक समान कलेवर, रक्ताम्बर राजै।
रक्तपुष्प गल माला, कंठन पर साजै॥
transliteration: Kanak Saman Kalevar, Raktambar Rajai.
Raktpushp Gal Mala, Kanthan Par Sajai.
meanings: Your body gleams like gold, draped in red cloth.
A garland of red flowers adorns your neck.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: केहरि वाहन राजत, खड्ग खप्पर धारी।
सुर नर मुनिजन सेवत, तिनके दुखहारी॥
transliteration: Kehari Vahan Rajat, Khadg Khappar Dhari.
Sur Nar Munijan Sevat, Tinke Dukhahari.
meanings: You ride majestically on a lion, holding a sword and skull-cup.
Gods, humans and sages serve you, you remove their sorrows.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: कानन कुण्डल शोभित, नासाग्रे मोती।
कोटिक चन्द्र दिवाकर, सम राजत ज्योति॥
transliteration: Kanan Kundal Shobhit, Nasagre Moti.
Kotik Chandra Divakar, Sam Rajat Jyoti.
meanings: Earrings adorn your ears, a pearl graces the tip of your nose.
Your radiance shines like millions of moons and suns.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: श्री रामचन्द्र कृपालु भजु मन हरण भवभय दारुणम्।
नवकंज लोचन कंजमुख कर कंज पद कंजारुणम्॥
transliteration: Shri Ramchandra Kripalu Bhaju Man Haran Bhavbhay Darunam.
Navkanj Lochan Kanjmukh Kar Kanj Pad Kanjarunam.
meanings: O mind, worship the compassionate Shri Ramchandra who destroys the terrible fear of worldly existence.
His eyes are like fresh lotuses, his face like a lotus, his hands and feet like reddish lotuses.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: कंदर्प अगणित अमित छवि नव नील नीरद सुन्दरम्।
पट पीत मानहुं तड़ित रुचि शुचि नौमि जनक सुतावरम्॥
transliteration: Kandarp Aganit Amit Chhavi Nav Neel Neerad Sundaram.
Pat Peet Manahun Tadit Ruchi Shuchi Naumi Janak Sutavaram.
meanings: His beauty surpasses countless Cupids, beautiful as a fresh blue rain cloud.
His yellow garments shimmer like lightning — I bow to the bridegroom of Janaka's daughter.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: भजु दीनबन्धु दिनेश दानव दैत्यवंशनिकन्दनम्।
रघुनन्द आनन्दकन्द कोशलचन्द दशरथनन्दनम्॥
transliteration: Bhaju Deenbandhu Dinesh Danav Daityavansh Nikandanam.
Raghunand Anandkand Koshalachand Dasharathnandanam.
meanings: Worship the friend of the humble, the sun god, destroyer of demons and their lineage.
He is the joy of the Raghu clan, the root of bliss, the moon of Kosala, son of Dasharatha.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: शिर मुकुट कुण्डल तिलक चारु उदारु अंग विभूषणम्।
आजानुभुज शर चापधर संग्राम जित खरदूषणम्॥
transliteration: Shir Mukut Kundal Tilak Charu Udaru Ang Vibhushanam.
Ajanubhuj Shar Chapdhar Sangram Jit Khardushanam.
meanings: Crown on head, earrings, beautiful tilak — his body adorned with gracious ornaments.
With arms reaching to his knees, bearing bow and arrows — he conquered Khara and Dushana in battle.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: जय सरस्वती माता, मैया जय सरस्वती माता।
सदगुण वैभव शालिनी, त्रिभुवन विख्याता॥
transliteration: Jai Saraswati Mata, Maiya Jai Saraswati Mata.
Sadgun Vaibhav Shalini, Tribhuvan Vikhyata.
meanings: Glory to Mother Saraswati, O divine mother.
Adorned with virtues and splendour, renowned across the three worlds.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: चन्द्रवदनी पद्मासनी, ध्यान धरूं मन लाई।
हम पे कृपा करो माता, बुद्धि दो न्याईं॥
transliteration: Chandravadni Padmasani, Dhyan Dharun Man Lai.
Ham Pe Kripa Karo Mata, Buddhi Do Nyai.
meanings: Moon-faced one, seated on a lotus — I meditate upon you with a focused mind.
Bestow your grace upon us, O Mother, grant us righteous intelligence.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: तुम्हीं हो सब जग की आधार, जगती सब तेरी शरण।
विद्या दायिनी कृपा कीजिए, गुणवन्ती तेरी चरण॥
transliteration: Tumhi Ho Sab Jag Ki Aadhar, Jagti Sab Teri Sharan.
Vidya Dayini Kripa Kijiye, Gunvanti Teri Charan.
meanings: You are the foundation of the whole world, all creation takes your shelter.
O bestower of knowledge, shower your grace — your feet are adorned with virtues.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: कठिन समय में शरण तेरी, तुम सबकी तारिणी।
हंसवाहिनी ज्ञानदायिनी, माँ कालरात्रि के नाशिनी॥
transliteration: Kathin Samay Mein Sharan Teri, Tum Sabki Tarini.
Hansvahini Gyandayini, Maa Kalratri Ke Nashini.
meanings: In difficult times we seek your refuge, you are the saviour of all.
Riding the swan, bestower of wisdom, O Mother, destroyer of the dark night.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: संकट को मिटावो माता, करुणा की छाया।
श्वेत वस्त्र धारिणी माँ, वीणा कर में साजे माया॥
transliteration: Sankat Ko Mitavo Mata, Karuna Ki Chhaya.
Shvet Vastra Dharini Maa, Veena Kar Mein Saje Maya.
meanings: Remove our troubles, O Mother, under the shade of your compassion.
Dressed in white garments, O Mother, the mystical Veena graces your hands.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: जय जय श्री शनिदेव भक्तन हितकारी।
सूरज के पुत्र प्रभु छाया महतारी॥
transliteration: Jai Jai Shri Shanidev Bhaktan Hitkari.
Suraj Ke Putra Prabhu Chhaya Mahtari.
meanings: Glory to Shri Shani Dev, benefactor of devotees.
Son of the Sun god, born of Mother Chhaya.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: श्याम शरीर विशाल, अंग निराला है।
नील अम्बर उज्ज्वल शिर पर मुकुट धारी॥
transliteration: Shyam Sharir Vishal, Ang Nirala Hai.
Neel Ambar Ujjwal Shir Par Mukut Dhari.
meanings: His dark body is large and his form unique.
Wearing a shining blue robe and a crown upon his head.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: दण्डकर्ता शनिदेव, न्याय प्रिय स्वामी।
कर्म फल दाता सबके, अन्तर्यामी॥
transliteration: Dandkarta Shanidev, Nyay Priya Swami.
Karm Phal Data Sabke, Antaryami.
meanings: Lord Shani, the punisher and deliverer of justice, lover of righteousness.
The giver of fruits of karma to all, the inner knower.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: जो जन शनि गुण गावे, कष्ट सबै मिट जावे।
जय जय श्री शनिदेव भक्तन हितकारी॥
transliteration: Jo Jan Shani Gun Gaave, Kasht Sabai Mit Jave.
Jai Jai Shri Shanidev Bhaktan Hitkari.
meanings: Those who sing the virtues of Shani, all their troubles vanish.
Glory to Shri Shani Dev, benefactor of devotees.

verses.label: Dhruva Pad
lines: ॐ जय जगदीश हरे, स्वामी जय जगदीश हरे।
भक्तजनों के संकट, क्षण में दूर करे॥
transliteration: Om Jai Jagdish Hare, Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
Bhaktjanon Ke Sankat, Kshan Mein Door Kare.
meanings: Glory to Lord Vishnu, the Lord of the universe.
He removes the troubles of devotees in an instant.

verses.label: Verse 1
lines: शंख चक्र गदा पद्म, श्री वनमाला विराजे।
गरुड़ वाहन नागरि, नयनन शोभा साजे॥
transliteration: Shankh Chakra Gada Padm, Shri Vanmala Viraje.
Garud Vahan Nagari, Naynan Shobha Saje.
meanings: Adorned with conch, discus, mace, lotus and the Vaijayanti garland.
With Garuda as his mount, the beauty of his eyes is splendid.

verses.label: Verse 2
lines: क्षीरसागर में विराजत, शेषनाग पर सोहे।
लक्ष्मी के संग रहत, तीनों लोक मोहे॥
transliteration: Kshirsagar Mein Virajat, Sheshnag Par Sohe.
Lakshmi Ke Sang Rahat, Teenon Lok Mohe.
meanings: He resides in the ocean of milk, reclining splendidly on Shesha Naga.
With Lakshmi by his side, he enchants all three worlds.

verses.label: Verse 3
lines: दशावतार लीला किन्हीं, भक्तन का उद्धारा।
कलि में श्री जगदीश, करत सबका सहारा॥
transliteration: Dashavatar Leela Kinhi, Bhaktan Ka Uddhara.
Kali Mein Shri Jagdish, Karat Sabka Sahara.
meanings: He performed the divine play of ten incarnations to uplift the devotees.
In the age of Kali, Lord Jagdish is the support of everyone.

verses.label: Verse 4
lines: नीलकमल से नैना, शुभ लक्षण हैं भारी।
पीताम्बर मुकुट कुण्डल, छवि अति प्यारी॥
transliteration: Neelkamal Se Naina, Shubh Lakshan Hain Bhari.
Pitambar Mukut Kundal, Chhavi Ati Pyari.
meanings: His eyes are like blue lotuses, filled with auspicious marks.
In yellow garments, crown and earrings — his form is most lovely.

verses.label: Verse 5
lines: तुलसी श्याम प्रसन्न हों, जग में सुख भारी।
विष्णु जी की आरती जो कोई नर गावे, कहत शिवानन्द स्वामी सुख सम्पत्ति पावे॥
transliteration: Tulsi Shyam Prasann Hon, Jag Mein Sukh Bhari.
Vishnu Ji Ki Aarti Jo Koi Nar Gave, Kahat Shivanand Swami Sukh Sampatti Pave.
meanings: May Lord Tulsi Shyam be pleased, filling the world with joy.
Whoever sings the aarti of Lord Vishnu — says Swami Shivanand — shall obtain happiness and prosperity.

verses.label: Doha 1
lines: जय गणेश गिरिजा सुवन, मंगल मूल सुजान।
कहत अयोध्यादास तुम, देहु अभय वरदान॥
transliteration: Jai Ganesh Girija Suvan, Mangal Mool Sujan.
Kahat Ayodhyadas Tum, Dehu Abhay Vardaan.
meanings: Glory to Ganesha, son of Girija (Parvati), the wise root of auspiciousness.
Says Ayodhyadas — grant me the boon of fearlessness.

verses.label: Doha 2
lines: जय गिरिजा पति दीनदयाला।
सदा करत सन्तन प्रतिपाला॥
transliteration: Jai Girija Pati Deendayala.
Sada Karat Santan Pratipala.
meanings: Glory to the merciful Lord of Girija (Parvati).
Who always protects and nurtures the saints.

verses.label: Chaupai 1
lines: भाल चन्द्रमा सोहत नीके।
कानन कुण्डल नागफनी के॥
transliteration: Bhal Chandrama Sohat Nike.
Kanan Kundal Nagphani Ke.
meanings: The crescent moon shines beautifully on his forehead.
Serpent-hooded earrings adorn his ears.

verses.label: Chaupai 2
lines: अंग गौर शिर गंग बहाये।
मुण्डमाल तन क्षार लगाये॥
transliteration: Ang Gaur Shir Gang Bahaye.
Mundmal Tan Kshar Lagaye.
meanings: His fair body with the Ganga flowing from his head.
A garland of skulls on his body, smeared with ash.

verses.label: Chaupai 3
lines: वस्त्र खाल बाघम्बर सोहे।
छवि को देख नाग मुनि मोहे॥
transliteration: Vastra Khal Baaghambar Sohe.
Chhavi Ko Dekh Naag Muni Mohe.
meanings: He is adorned with a tiger skin garment.
Seeing his beauty, even serpents and sages are enchanted.

verses.label: Chaupai 4
lines: मैना मातु की हवसि दुलारी।
वाम अंग सोहत छवि न्यारी॥
transliteration: Maina Matu Ki Havsi Dulari.
Vam Ang Sohat Chhavi Nyari.
meanings: Mother Maina's beloved daughter (Parvati).
Adorns his left side with a unique radiance.

verses.label: Chaupai 5
lines: कर त्रिशूल सोहत छवि भारी।
करत सदा भक्तन हितकारी॥
transliteration: Kar Trishul Sohat Chhavi Bhari.
Karat Sada Bhaktan Hitkari.
meanings: The trident in his hand shines with mighty splendour.
He always acts for the welfare of his devotees.

verses.label: Chaupai 6
lines: नन्दि गणेश सोहत तहं कैसे।
सागर मध्य कमल है जैसे॥
transliteration: Nandi Ganesh Sohat Tahan Kaise.
Sagar Madhya Kamal Hai Jaise.
meanings: Nandi and Ganesha look beautiful beside him.
Like lotuses in the middle of the ocean.
